{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = White Fox technique
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[White Fox technique]] created a purple star in the air above the fighters.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
